evidence.q1: Sections numbered 1 through 15 sequentially; cross-references like 'the closed list in Section 4' resolve.
evidence.q2: 'Major Investor', 'Requisite Holders', 'Permitted Transferee' defined in Section 2 and used consistently throughout.
evidence.q3: No vague time/quantity: e.g., 'within 15 days after month-end', 'more than 10% of the shares'.
evidence.q4: No archaic legal diction; uses modern language like 'without regard to conflict-of-law rules'.
evidence.q5: No internally contradictory or grammatically broken sentences; e.g., Section 7 obligation is one-sided but grammatical.
evidence.q6: Consistent modern register across all sections; no author-switch detectable.
